description:
You are the on-call DevOps engineer.  
A developer complains that the application’s debug statements are not being collected.  
Your job is to:  

1. Turn on verbose logging  
   • File to edit: /home/user/webapp/config/server.env  
   • Replace the existing line  
     LOG_LEVEL=info  
     with  
     LOG_LEVEL=debug  
   • Make **no other** changes to the file.  

2. Tell the (mock) service to reload its configuration  
   • Create the file /home/user/webapp/tmp/reload.flag (parent directory already exists).  
   • The file must contain exactly one line with the single word:  
     reload  

3. Produce a filtered debug report from the historical log  
   • Input log: /home/user/webapp/logs/webapp.log  
   • Output file: /home/user/webapp/logs/debug_report_20231009.log  
     (use the fixed date 20231009 shown here; do not generate today’s date).  
   • The output file **must follow this exact layout** so that automated tests can verify it:

     Line 1 : DEBUG REPORT - 2023-10-09  
     Line 2 : (blank)  
     Line 3+ : every line from the input log that contains the literal substring “[DEBUG]”, preserved verbatim and in the same order in which they appear in the source log, one per line.  
     Final-1 : (blank line)  
     Final   : Total Debug Lines: X  

     where X is the count of “[DEBUG]” lines that were copied.

4. Leave all other files untouched.  
5. Do **not** print the contents of the report to the console; the presence and exact content of the file will be checked by the grader.  

When you are finished there should be:  
• an updated /home/user/webapp/config/server.env with LOG_LEVEL=debug,  
• a one-line /home/user/webapp/tmp/reload.flag containing “reload”, and  
• a correctly formatted /home/user/webapp/logs/debug_report_20231009.log summarising the debug lines.  

No other output or files are required.
truth:
Initial filesystem (before the agent starts):

/home/user/webapp/config/server.env  
------------------------------------------------  
APP_PORT=8080  
LOG_LEVEL=info  
DB_HOST=localhost  
------------------------------------------------  

/home/user/webapp/tmp/     (empty; already exists)

/home/user/webapp/logs/webapp.log  
------------------------------------------------  
2023-10-09 12:34:56 [DEBUG] Connected to database  
2023-10-09 12:35:01 [INFO]  Request processed  
2023-10-09 12:35:02 [DEBUG] Cache miss for key: user_123  
2023-10-09 12:35:04 [ERROR] Failed to send email  
2023-10-09 12:35:05 [DEBUG] Retrying request id: 456  
------------------------------------------------  

Expected state **after** successful task completion:

1. /home/user/webapp/config/server.env  
------------------------------------------------  
APP_PORT=8080  
LOG_LEVEL=debug  
DB_HOST=localhost  
------------------------------------------------  

2. /home/user/webapp/tmp/reload.flag  
------------------------------------------------  
reload  
------------------------------------------------  

3. /home/user/webapp/logs/debug_report_20231009.log  
------------------------------------------------  
DEBUG REPORT - 2023-10-09  

2023-10-09 12:34:56 [DEBUG] Connected to database  
2023-10-09 12:35:02 [DEBUG] Cache miss for key: user_123  
2023-10-09 12:35:05 [DEBUG] Retrying request id: 456  

Total Debug Lines: 3  
------------------------------------------------
